summary: Route Summaries feature fully tested and working. All 7 user-requested changes verified: (1) Separate driver inputs per route sub-code (SR1/SR2, LR1/LR2, LFT, ONS), (2) PDF uses doubled font sizes and black & white theme, (3) SR1/SR2 and LR1/LR2 split into distinct grouped sections with Total columns BEFORE customer columns, (4) Total columns for Onsite and Lulu too, (5) LFT label used for Lulu (not LULU1), (6) Black & white PDF printing configured, (7) Date picker with prev/next arrows working.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data for dates 2026-02-15 and 2026-03-30
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route Summaries feature complete. Backend API /api/admin/reports/route-summary tested with all 4 route types (lulu, short, long, onsite). Frontend verified: 4 route buttons with correct codes (LFT, SR1/SR2, LR1/LR2, ONS), separate driver inputs per sub-code, grouped table with Total columns before customer columns, date picker with prev/next navigation, Print/Save PDF button.

frontend_ui_tests.four_route_buttons_visible: PASSED - Lulu Trip/LFT, Short Route/SR1 SR2, Long Route/LR1 LR2, Onsite/ONS
frontend_ui_tests.short_route_driver_inputs: PASSED - SR1 Driver and SR2 Driver fields visible
frontend_ui_tests.long_route_driver_inputs: PASSED - LR1 Driver and LR2 Driver fields visible
frontend_ui_tests.table_total_columns_before_customers: PASSED - SR1 Total before SR1 customers, SR2 Total before SR2 customers
frontend_ui_tests.date_picker_with_arrows: PASSED - Left/right chevron arrows navigate dates
frontend_ui_tests.date_navigation_works: PASSED - Changed from Mon 30 Mar to Sun 29 Mar
frontend_ui_tests.print_save_pdf_button: PASSED - Button visible after data loads

features_verified.requirement_1_separate_driver_inputs: VERIFIED - Each route sub-code (SR1, SR2, LR1, LR2, LFT, ONS) has its own driver input field
features_verified.requirement_2_double_font_size_pdf: VERIFIED - PDF HTML uses body 18px, headers 28px, table 16px (doubled from standard)
features_verified.requirement_3_grouped_sections_with_tota: VERIFIED - Table shows Total column BEFORE customer columns for each group
features_verified.requirement_4_total_columns_all_routes: VERIFIED - Onsite has ONS Total, Lulu has LFT Total
features_verified.requirement_5_lft_label_for_lulu: VERIFIED - Backend ROUTE_MAP uses 'LFT' for lulu, frontend shows 'LFT' code
features_verified.requirement_6_black_white_pdf: VERIFIED - PDF CSS uses #000 text, #fff/#ddd/#eee backgrounds (no colored backgrounds)
features_verified.requirement_7_date_picker_navigation: VERIFIED - Chevron arrows navigate to previous/next day
